query:
-- Move all services from orphaned C0106 to active C0107 (Graphene Manufacturing Australia)
UPDATE services SET customerExternalId = 'C0107', updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE customerExternalId = 'C0106';

-- Recalculate C0107 stats
UPDATE customers SET
  monthlyCost    = (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(s.monthlyCost), 0)    FROM services s WHERE s.customerExternalId = 'C0107' AND s.status NOT IN ('terminated','archived')),
  monthlyRevenue = (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(s.monthlyRevenue), 0) FROM services s WHERE s.customerExternalId = 'C0107' AND s.status NOT IN ('terminated','archived')),
  serviceCount   = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM services s WHERE s.customerExternalId = 'C0107' AND s.status NOT IN ('terminated','archived')),
  marginPercent  = ROUND(
    ((SELECT COALESCE(SUM(s.monthlyRevenue), 0) FROM services s WHERE s.customerExternalId = 'C0107' AND s.status NOT IN ('terminated','archived'))
     - (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(s.monthlyCost), 0) FROM services s WHERE s.customerExternalId = 'C0107' AND s.status NOT IN ('terminated','archived')))
    / NULLIF((SELECT COALESCE(SUM(s.monthlyRevenue), 0) FROM services s WHERE s.customerExternalId = 'C0107' AND s.status NOT IN ('terminated','archived')), 0)
    * 100, 2),
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE externalId = 'C0107';

  monthlyRevenue = (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(s.monthlyRevenue), 0) FROM services s WHERE s.customerExternalId = 'C0107' AND s.status NOT IN ('terminated','archived')),
  serviceCount   = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM services s WHERE s.customerExternalId = 'C0107' AND s.status NOT IN ('terminated','archived')),
  marginPercent  = ROUND(
    ((SELECT COALESCE(SUM(s.monthlyRevenue), 0) FROM services s WHERE s.customerExternalId = 'C0107' AND s.status NOT IN ('terminated','archived'))
     - (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(s.monthlyCost), 0) FROM services s WHERE s.customerExternalId = 'C0107' AND s.status NOT IN ('terminated','archived')))
    / NULLIF((SELECT COALESCE(SUM(s.monthlyRevenue), 0) FROM services s WHERE s.customerExternalId = 'C0107' AND s.status NOT IN ('terminated','archived')), 0)
